flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of Mary rose 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($21.5k → $24.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Mary rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($20.3k → $22.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Mary rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($20.3k → $22.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Mary fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).
